privileged_info_summary: The Mitosis sample is a verified, real microscopy dataset (not synthetic) available in Fiji via File > Open Samples > Mitosis. It is 26MB in size and contains 5D data (2 channels, 24 z-slices, 7 time frames) of HeLa cells. The sample uses mCherry to label tubulin (forming the red mitotic spindle apparatus) and GFP to label centromeres (appearing green). Results directory verified as /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results. CRITICAL ISSUE: The task description incorrectly specifies the Green channel contains 'spindles'—GFP (green) labels centromeres while mCherry (red) labels the spindle apparatus (microtubules/tubulin).
